issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error scenarios or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Append a new chat message live without a full page reload using Turbo
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used turbo-stream action="append" target="messages" with a <template> wrapper plus a uniquely-IDed inner div as documented; baseline reached for fetch+innerHTML or a JS framework, missing the server-rendered HTML-over-the-wire pattern.

scenarios.name: Build a click-outside dropdown menu with minimal JS
scenarios.rationale: Treatment built a Stimulus controller with static targets/values/classes and data-action="click@window->dropdown#close" plus openValueChanged callback as documented; baseline wrote vanilla JS event listeners without the controller lifecycle wiring.
